details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. 3 times on each of your turns, when you play an amulet, recover 1 play point. [act] [engage] 3 amulets on your field: Draw a card.

Once on each of your turns, when a Mount card you control leaves the field, put a Dutiful Steed, Bullet Bike, and Arcane Personnel Carrier token into your EX area and give your leader [defense]+2. [act] Banish 3 amulets from your field: Choose one. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) Select another follower on your field and give it [attack]+3/[defense]+3.
Storm. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. Combo (5) - Deal it 3 damage. Strike, Combo (3) - Give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [act] [cost02], put this card from your hand into your EX area: Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. [act] Banish 2 other cards from your EX area: Give this follower in your EX area [attack]+2. Draw a card. Activate only once per turn.
Storm. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to this follower's attack.
[fanfare] Put a Bullet Bike and Arcane Personnel Carrier token into your EX area. Deal each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field damage equal to the number of Mount cards in your EX area.
As an additional cost to play this card, bury 4 Pixie tokens. ---------- Search your deck for an Aria, Fairy Princess, summon it, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. During your turn, whenever a Mount card is put into your EX area, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
On Evolve - Put a Dutiful Steed token into your EX area. During your turn, whenever a Mount card is put into your EX area, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
Once on each of your turns, when a Puppet is put onto your field, put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area. [act] [cost04]: Give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2. Summon a Puppet token.
Select any number of Pixie tokens on your field. For the rest of this turn, they have "[act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader."
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom of your deck. Put 2 Fairy tokens into your EX area.
On Evolve - Summon 2 Fairy tokens.

[fanfare] Put a Dutiful Steed token into your EX area. [lastwords] Select an enemy follower on the field and, if there are at least 3 Mount cards on your field and/or in your EX area, deal it 3 damage.
Ward. [fanfare] Search your deck for a follower with Ward, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. [fanfare] [cost05]: You may summon a follower with Ward from your hand.
Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. Combo (3) - Deal 5 damage instead.
Select a Puppetry card in your cemetery. Add it to your hand and put a Puppet token into your EX area.

[fanfare] Search your deck for a 1-cost [swordcraft] card, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. [act] [cost00]: Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. It becomes Boxed until the end of its controller's next turn. Activate only once per turn. (Boxed followers lose all abilities and don't refresh during the start phase.)
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Choose one. (1) Summon a Val, Trusty Getaway Car token. (2) Search your deck for a Desperados' Shot, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 faceup evolved followers in your evolve deck, evolve this follower.
Assail. At the start of your end phase, give this follower and your leader [defense]+2.
[fanfare] Summon a Dutiful Steed token. [act] [engage] this card and 2 Mount cards on your field: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
Select up to 1 Boxed enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, search your deck for a Wasteland follower, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy card on the field and destroy it.
Assail. On Evolve - Deal 3 damage to each enemy leader.
[fanfare] Summon a Bullet Bike token. [lastwords] Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.

Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. If there's a Bunny & Baron, Specter Duo and Val, Trusty Getaway Car on your field, deal 6 damage instead and deal 2 damage to the selected follower's leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
Intimidate.
This card costs 1 less to play from the EX area if there's a Nahtnaught, Cursed Queen on your field. ---------- [fanfare] If there's a Nahtnaught, Cursed Queen on your field, draw a card.

[fanfare] [costX]: Summon X Steelclad Knight tokens. X equals a number of your choice. [act] [engage]: For the rest of this turn, each [swordcraft] follower currently on your field has Rush and Assail.

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may summon a follower that costs 3 or less from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you summoned a Thief follower, give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
[quick] This card can't be played during your turn. ---------- Select a follower on your field and put it into its owner's EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if this follower has gained attack or defense this turn. [fanfare] Search your deck for a Wasteland card, bury it, then shuffle.

On Evolve - If there are at least 3 cards with different base costs in your cemetery, give your leader [defense]+3. If there are at least 6, draw a card. If there are at least 9, deal 9 damage to each enemy follower on the field. If there are at least 12, deal 12 damage to each enemy leader.

[fanfare] Summon a Dutiful Steed token. Search your deck for a Rapid Fire, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. Spellchain (5) - It costs 1 less to play this turn. Once on each of your turns, when you play a spell that originally costs 1 or less, draw a card, then discard a card.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Summon a Bullet Bike token. During your turn, whenever a Mount card is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage, draw a card, then discard a card.

On Evolve - If there are at least 6 cards with different base costs in your cemetery, summon an Arcane Personnel Carrier token. During your turn, whenever a Mount card is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage, draw a card, then discard a card.
[fanfare] Select a Golem follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand. [act] [engage]: Select a Golem follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

Select an enemy follower on the field. It loses all abilities for the rest of this turn and, if there are at least 6 cards with different base costs in your cemetery, you give your leader [defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Rush. Bane. Drain. [act] Earth Rite: Select another follower on your field and give it Rush, Bane, or Drain.
Bane. Drain. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and put it into its owner's EX area. [act] Earth Rite: Select another follower on your field and give it Rush, Bane, or Drain.

When this card is discarded, put an Arcane Personnel Carrier token into your EX area. ---------- [fanfare] Select a Wasteland follower that costs 6 or less in your cemetery. Summon it, then summon an Arcane Personnel Carrier token.

[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 3 cards named Rapid Fire in your cemetery, deal 3 damage instead. If there are at least 5, deal 4 damage to its leader. ---------- You can put up to 6 of this card into your deck.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Draw a card. Discard a card.
On Evolve - You may put a [runecraft] spell from your hand into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn.
[fanfare] Summon a Dutiful Steed token. Once on each of your turns, when a Mount card is put onto your field, draw a card, then discard a card.
Storm. During each opponent's turn, whenever this follower takes damage, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
[quick] Summon a Magic Sediment token. Add 2 to a Stack on your field.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage. If there are at least 2 Mage followers on your field, deal 2 damage to its leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. While Overflow is active for you, this follower has Storm. [fanfare] Select a Wasteland follower that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and summon it.
While Overflow is active for you, this follower has Storm. On Evolve - Give each other Wasteland follower on your field [attack]+1.
Ward. [fanfare] [cost02]: If Overflow is active for you, shuffle your deck, then put the top card into your EX area. It costs 0 to play this turn. [lastwords] Give your leader [defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and, if Overflow is active for you, deal 2 damage to it and its leader.
On Evolve - Destroy each enemy follower with 3 defense or less on the field.
[fanfare] Summon a Dutiful Steed token. During your turn, whenever another Wasteland card is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

[fanfare] For each [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more in your cemetery, select up to 1 enemy follower on the field and banish it. [act] [cost03], discard this card and a [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more: Increase your max play points by 1. Draw a card.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 6 damage. [act] [cost01], discard this card and a [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 6 damage.
[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Wasteland card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

[quick] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 2 [dragoncraft] cards that cost 7 or more and add them to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. While there are at least 5 Marine cards in your cemetery, this follower has Storm.
While there are at least 5 Marine cards in your cemetery, this follower has Storm. On Evolve - Discard a Marine card: Draw 2 cards.
[lastwords] Summon a Bullet Bike token.
Ward. [fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+5. Draw 2 cards. [act] [cost02], discard this card and a [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more: Give your leader [defense]+5.
[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put a Marine card from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

[quick] As an additional cost to play this card, you may discard a [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If you paid this card's additional cost, deal 4 damage instead and draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there's no Magitrain on your field, summon one. Whenever this card becomes engaged, each opponent discards a card.

On Evolve - Discard a card: Select 2 followers in your cemetery and add them to your hand. Whenever this card becomes engaged, each opponent discards a card. During your turn, whenever a player discards a card, select an enemy follower on the field and engage it.

[fanfare] Select a Wasteland follower that costs 3 or less in your cemetery. Necrocharge (10) - You may summon it. If you do, banish this card. [lastwords] Put this card into its owner's EX area. Bury the top card of your deck.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if Sanguine is active for you. Assail. Bane. Drain.
Assail. Bane. Drain. Strike - Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. Refresh this follower. Perform only once per turn.
[fanfare] Bury another card: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. Once per turn, when a 1-cost token card you control leaves the field, summon a token of the same name.

[act] Banish this card and an Iceschillendrig, Gilded Autocrat from your cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. ---------- [quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack]-2/[defense]-2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if this follower was put onto the field from the cemetery. Rush. [lastwords] Summon a Bullet Bike token. Bury the top 2 cards of your deck.
Storm. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage. [lastwords] Summon a Bullet Bike token. Bury the top 2 cards of your deck.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and a Wasteland follower that costs 3 or less in your cemetery. Necrocharge (10) - Deal 4 damage to the first follower and summon the second.
Select 2 Wasteland followers that cost 3 or less in your cemetery. Necrocharge (10) - Summon them.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there's an amulet on your field, give this follower Rush and Assail.
Follower Strike - For the rest of this turn, this follower doesn't take damage. At the start of your end phase, refresh this card.
Whenever this follower gains attack or defense, give it Storm. [lastwords] Summon a Bullet Bike token. Bury the top card of your deck.
Rush. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[fanfare] Deal 1 damage to each enemy leader. If Sanguine is active for you, deal 3 damage instead.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Engage it and draw a card. It doesn't refresh during its controller's next start phase.

Storm. [fanfare] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may put up to 1 Wasteland card and up to 1 follower that costs 2 or less into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Strike - Recover 2 play points.

[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+1. Draw a card. Discard a card. [act] [cost02]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and give your leader [defense]+1.

This card doesn't refresh during your start phase. Whenever your leader gains defense, refresh this card. [act] [engage]: Choose one that you haven't chosen this turn. Ward. On Evolve - If there are at least 4 followers with Ward on your field, draw 2 cards.

[fanfare] If there's an amulet on your field, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Strike - Draw a card. Discard a card.

[act] [engage], banish 3 Goblinoid cards from your cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and deal 3 damage to its leader.
